name: 12.75oz Stemmed Hutton Wine Glass - Threshold™
description:
Sip your favorite delicious wines in elegant style with this Stemmed Hutton Wine Glass from Threshold™. Made of glass, this transparent wine glass is designed in a classic shape that complements any table setting. Dishwasher safe for easy cleaning, this 12.75-ounce glass has a stemmed base for a comfortable grip.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
